protocols.Paper_title: Influenza A Infection of Primary Human Airway Epithelial Cells Up-Regulates Proteins Related to Purine Metabolism and Ubiquitin-Related Signaling
protocols.Evidence: lysed for cytosolic proteins by adding NP-40 buffer...various buffers: 0.5% NP40 + 1% DOC + 0.1% SDS...high salt detergent-free buffer or 8 M urea

protocols.Paper_title: Influenza A Infection of Primary Human Airway Epithelial Cells Up-Regulates Proteins Related to Purine Metabolism and Ubiquitin-Related Signaling
protocols.Evidence: high salt detergent-free buffer extraction, followed by 8 M urea extraction (HSU)...does not contain detergents and allows for simplified downstream sample processing for mass spectrometry

protocols.Paper_title: Influenza A Infection of Primary Human Airway Epithelial Cells Up-Regulates Proteins Related to Purine Metabolism and Ubiquitin-Related Signaling
protocols.Evidence: cells were treated with 0.5% NP40 buffer...to extract cytosolic proteins. Nuclei were then pelleted...washed 3 times in 12% sucrose in PBS, and lysed with HSU

protocols.Paper_title: Influenza A Infection of Primary Human Airway Epithelial Cells Up-Regulates Proteins Related to Purine Metabolism and Ubiquitin-Related Signaling
